title: Better End Sky
description: Ripoff of the Better End mod's sky renderer in a standalone mod for a client-side only usage.
body: ## About Fancy sky renderer for The End dimension from the hit mod [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) by [paulevs](https://github.com/paulevsGitch) and [BetterX Team](https://discord.gg/kYuATbYbKW) in a standalone mod for client-side only usage. ### Preview
